subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, mayest thou be enkindled by the fire of divine love on this spiritual day and through remembrance and [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
